description: Desk-return feed - marks each of the 7 strategy desks' books to today's close as a signed-weight daily MTM return series, so the Desk Allocator's Bayesian shrinkage can blend realized vol in over the archetype priors. Output data/desk-returns.json.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Weekdays 23:30 UTC via Amazon EventBridge Scheduler - after the US close so books mark to settled prices, and before the Desk Allocator's 00:30 UTC run so the fresh return series is available. Provisioned by ops 841.
